get.description: This endpoint shows you the list of all purchased timestamps

example.message: you have not assigned any batch of time stamps

get.description:
This endpoint allows you to purchase time stamps.

### Applying Time stamps (Marche Temporali)
To apply a time stamp to a document via the API, use the `POST /marca` endpoint.

---
### Provider Compatibility

> **Important Note:**
> The `POST /marca` endpoint is designed to work **exclusively** with time stamps purchased from **Infocert**. It is **not** compatible with timestamps acquired from **Aruba**.

---
### Procedure for Aruba Timestamps
If you are using Aruba time stamps, you must use their dedicated tools.

**ArubaSign Web Portal**
An online tool for applying time stamps directly in a web browser.
- **Link:** [https://arubasign.arubapec.it/asonline/](https://arubasign.arubapec.it/asonline/)

**ArubaSign Desktop Software**
A downloadable application for managing digital signatures and timestamps on your computer.
- **Link:** [https://www.pec.it/gestione-supporto-firma-digitale.aspx](https://www.pec.it/gestione-supporto-firma-digitale.aspx)

example.message: internal error, new identity not inserted

post.description: This endpoint allows you to mark a document in time; if you do not have our timestamps you can still mark a document by passing only 'file' parameter.
